_comment: Starter pack template. Replace URLs with real PD/CC0 sources before running.
_instructions: 1. Browse https://librivox.org or https://archive.org for public-domain readings
that match each archetype voice (clear single speaker, ~10s usable window).
2. Fill `url` with the direct .mp3/.ogg link from archive.org.
3. Pick `start` (seconds into the file) and `duration` (8-12 sec recommended).
4. Set license to PD for LibriVox (US public domain by policy).
